evals.prompt: Review the current PR on branch iter-1/api-clients against main
evals.expected_output: Structured review with summary, critical issues, improvements, and observations covering the changes in this PR
expectations: Review covers the actual diff between main and iter-1/api-clients
Output uses structured format with Summary, Critical Issues, Improvements, and Observations sections
Identifies at least one concrete issue with file and line references
Reviews error handling patterns in the changed code

evals.expected_output: Focused review of the scanner module covering API design, error handling, and Rust best practices
expectations: Reads and reviews files in src/scanner.rs
Evaluates public API surface and trait implementations
Checks error type quality (implements std::error::Error, Display, Debug)

evals.prompt: Review the error handling across all modules
evals.expected_output: Cross-cutting review comparing error handling patterns across the codebase
expectations: Reads error types from multiple modules, not just one
Compares error handling consistency across modules
Checks for unwrap/expect usage in library code
Evaluates whether error types implement standard traits
